news.title: Samsung's shares surge as much as 6% after company ships next-generation AI memory chip samples
news.detail: Shares of Samsung Electronics surged after the company began shipping HBM4E chip samples to its customers globally.

news.title: Costco says it saw 'record-breaking' gas volumes amid rising prices
news.detail: Costco saw "recording-breaking volumes" of gas sales and said rising fuel prices drove first-time members to its stations.

news.title: Anthropic tops OpenAI as most valuable AI startup, nears $1 trillion valuation in latest round
news.detail: Anthropic is now the most valuable AI company in Silicon Valley after a new $65 billion funding round.

news.title: Asia markets rise as investors weigh Iran military activity against signs of temporary U.S.-Iran deal
news.detail: Asia-Pacific markets rose as investors shrugged off renewed Iran tensions against ceasefire optimism.

news.title: LG Electronics' shares surge 24% after showing automotive innovations using Google tech
news.detail: Shares of LG Electronics surged after it unveiled automotive innovations using Google technology.

news.title: Americans’ savings rate falls to lowest level since 2022 as inflation outpaces paychecks
news.detail: As inflation starts outpacing wages again, Americans have less money to put aside for emergencies and other savings goals.

news.title: Stock futures are little changed as traders eye developments in Middle East: Live updates
news.detail: Boosted by a rally in the tech sector, all three major averages rose to fresh closing highs on Thursday.

news.title: U.S. government is reportedly set to invest in drone industry. These are Wall Street’s favorite plays
news.detail: Analysts believe that stocks such as Unusual Machines and Motorola Solutions are most likely to benefit from heightened interest in the drone industry.

news.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Dell Technologies, American Eagle Outfitters, Gap & more
news.detail: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

news.title: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
news.detail: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.
